task_completion.description: Set location to Kaifeng (34.80° N, 114.30° E, 70m) and time to July 4, 1054 AD at 20:30 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom information bar or the Location/Date & Time windows in Stellarium show the location as Kaifeng (or the specific coordinates) and the date/time as 1054-07-04 20:30 UTC.

task_completion.description: Configure display settings: atmosphere off, constellation lines on, constellation labels on, azimuthal grid on.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky is black (atmosphere off), constellation lines and labels (e.g., 'Taurus') are visible, and the azimuthal coordinate grid (usually green circular lines) is displayed on the sky.

task_completion.description: Center the view on the Crab Nebula (M1) in Taurus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Crab Nebula (M1) is selected and centered in the Stellarium view, located within the Taurus constellation.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the view to ~/Pictures/stellarium/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager showing the saved screenshot in ~/Pictures/stellarium/, a terminal command moving/verifying the screenshot, or a confirmation message in Stellarium indicating the screenshot was saved to that directory.

task_completion.description: Save the location and display configurations to the application's configuration file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Configuration window is open showing the 'Save settings' button being clicked, or a terminal/editor showing the config.ini file being modified or verified.

task_completion.description: Write a historical summary report to ~/Desktop/guest_star_report.txt containing specific keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is open showing a file named 'guest_star_report.txt' saved on the Desktop. The text includes the terms 'Crab Nebula', 'Taurus', 'Song Dynasty', and 'Kaifeng'.

integrity.description: The agent actually used Stellarium to visualize the sky.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Stellarium GUI being interacted with, rather than just editing config files without opening the application.

integrity.description: The agent wrote a coherent historical report rather than just pasting the keywords.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in guest_star_report.txt forms a coherent summary or sentences, not just a raw list of the required keywords.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to set up the view before taking the screenshot.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is visual evidence of the Stellarium sky view matching the requirements, not just terminal commands modifying the config file and taking a headless screenshot.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Kaifeng, China coordinates: 34.80° N, 114.30° E, Altitude: 70m. Date: 1054-07-04. Time: 20:30:00 UTC. Target: Crab Nebula (M1) in Taurus. Required display flags: atmosphere OFF, constellation lines ON, constellation labels ON, azimuthal grid ON. Keywords for report: 'Crab Nebula', 'Taurus', 'Song Dynasty', 'Kaifeng'.
